SLIMEBOSS-SLIME_BOSS.aromaPrinciple: [sine][green]We are many. We are one. We are many. We are one. [jitter]We are many.[/jitter][/green][/sine]
SLIMEBOSS-SLIME_BOSS.cardsModifierDescri: Slime Boss cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
SLIMEBOSS-SLIME_BOSS.description:
The Heart's slimiest general.
Can fight as one, or as many.
SLIMEBOSS-SLIME_BOSS.eventDeathPreventio: We cannot fall. Our slimes still need us!
SLIMEBOSS-SLIME_BOSS.goldMonologue: [sine]So much gold... enough to fill a whole pool of goo...[/sine]
SLIMEBOSS-SLIME_BOSS.title: The Slime Boss
